headline: Microsoft Fixing Remaining Windows 11 Bugs Ahead of October 5 Release
summary: With just two days to go before the official release of Windows 11 on October 5, Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT) continues to work on fixing remaining bugs.

headline: Nikola's $2B Lawsuit Against Tesla Days Away From Dismissal: What Investors Should Know
summary: In case you forgot, Nikola Corp (NASDAQ: NKLA) filed a $2 billion lawsuit against Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) in 2018 over the similarity in design between the two companies' semi-trucks.

headline: Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos Invests In Indonesian Ecommerce Company: What Investors Should Know
summary: One of the richest people in the world gained his wealth by creating a leading ecommerce company. He is also among the investors in an Indonesian ecommerce company, but is doing so on his own and not with his company.

headline: Elon Musk's Tesla Accuses Rivian Of Poaching Employees, Stealing Battery Secrets
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) has again raised the employee poaching issue with electric truck and SUV maker Rivian Automotive Inc.

headline: 'Venom: Let There Be Carnage' Shatters Pandemic-Era Box Office With $90.1M Opening Weekend
summary: “Venom: Let There Be Carnage” scored the highest-grossing opening weekend since U.S. movie theaters reopened from the pandemic, with $90.1 million in ticket sales at the domestic box office.

headline: Disney's 'Shang-Chi' Becomes Year's Top Grossing Film, 'Dear Evan Hansen' Hits Sour Note At Box Office
summary: The Walt Disney Co.’s (NYSE: DIS) “Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings” maintained its hold as the top film in the U.S.

headline: 'Seinfeld' Now Ranked #6 on Netflix After Friday Launch
Images Of Apple Watch Series 7 Posted On Social Media, Then Deleted
summary: The first images of the Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) Watch Series 7 out in the public have been posted on social media, ahead of an anticipated October launch of the device.

headline: Amgen Reported a Stake of 2.7M Shares in Jasper Therapeutics in a 13G Filing on Friday
@InsideEVs Reports 'As Demand Soars, Tesla Launches Largest Delivery Center In Asia'
